overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, ascends a stairwell to an elevated pedestrian plaza, and crosses a final street surrounded by futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the Fuyutsuki building, passing pedestrians and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit standing near the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: large pink and blue neon sign for 'JACKED AND DORE' on building facade
tall red and teal curved building with illuminated windows and signage
modern glass skyscraper with reflective surfaces
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a wet neon-lit sidewalk in a cyberpunk city. The 'JACKED AND DORE' neon sign glows on the left while the distinctive Fuyutsuki building looms ahead. Sparse pedestrians populate the sidewalk as the camera moves forward through the artificial night lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk approaching commercial building entrance

events.description: stepping from sidewalk onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross street
turning right after crossing to walk along building front

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the Fuyutsuki building entrance, then turning right along the curved sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with glowing green 'WALK' text
red illuminated vending machine near building entrance
building entrance with glowing red 'Fuyutsuki' signage above doors
asphalt street curving around the building with red curb markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward the Fuyutsuki building entrance, passing a red vending machine. After crossing, the path turns right to follow the building's curved facade along a road with passing vehicles. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairwell leading to elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: entering covered concrete stairwell area beneath overpass
beginning ascent up long concrete staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk then entering a covered stairwell and climbing the stairs to an upper plaza level

entered.detail: concrete entranceway leading to stairs beneath an overpass structure
wide concrete staircase with red-painted edges ascending to upper level
blue and black garbage bags piled near the stairwell base

segments.scene_description: The path continues along a curved sidewalk before entering a covered concrete stairwell beneath an overpass. The environment becomes enclosed and dimly lit. The character ascends a long flight of concrete stairs, passing trash bags, transitioning from street level to an elevated pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with neon billboards and street crossings

events.description: emerging from stairs onto open elevated plaza with neon advertisements
crossing yellow-striped crosswalk on upper level with vehicles passing below

agents.ego_description: walking across the elevated plaza past a food vendor, then crossing the upper-level crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: wide elevated pedestrian area with tiled flooring and overhead walkways
large vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
small vendor stall with yellow barrels and illuminated signage
elevated pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes spanning the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto a spacious elevated plaza, the scene opens to reveal towering neon billboards and a food vendor stall. The character walks across the tiled plaza and steps onto another yellow crosswalk, this time on an upper level, as vehicles pass on the road below. The environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with dense neon lighting and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban district that transitions from a neon-lit street level to an elevated pedestrian plaza. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk beneath the glow of a JACKED AND DORE sign toward the looming Fuyutsuki building. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk and passes a red vending machine, the path curves along the building's facade, following the reflections of neon lights on the pavement. The scene then shifts from the open street into the enclosed, dimly lit environment of a concrete stairwell, ascending past discarded trash bags to leave the ground level behind. Finally, the camera emerges onto a spacious upper plaza filled with towering billboards and food stalls, crossing another elevated intersection high above the passing traffic.
